items.title: Stocks Fall Ahead of Nvidia Earnings and US Economic Data
items.description: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) on Monday fell by -0.92%, the Dow Jones Industrials Index ($DOWI ) (DIA ) fell by -1.18%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) fell by -0.83%. December E-mini S&P futures (ESZ25 ) fell -0.83%, and December E-mini Nasdaq futures...

items.title: Home Depot’s Mojo Stalls. Earnings Are a Worry.
items.description: Big-box estimates have edged down slightly as foot traffic declines and analysts worry about shoppers losing their appetite.

items.title: Earnings live: XPeng stock sinks, investors count down to Nvidia earnings
items.description: The third quarter earnings season has been mostly positive, with most of the reports in the rearview mirror.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq slide as sell-off resumes ahead of Nvidia earnings, jobs data
items.description: Investors get their first official read on the labor market this week after a shutdown-induced blackout.

items.title: Berkshire trims Apple stake, Quantum Computing reports Q3 profit
items.description: Market Domination host Josh Lipton tracks several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including Apple (AAPL) after Berkshire Hathaway (BRK-A, BRK-B) sold off more of its holdings in the iPhone developer, Home Depot's (HD) stock moves ahead of reporting earnings on Tuesday, and Quantum Computing (QUBT) beating third quarter earnings and revenue estimates. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.
